certificate.description: The X.509 certificated presented by EV and encoded in PEM format.

CustomDataType.description: This class does not get 'AdditionalProperties = false' in the schema generation, so it can be extended with arbitrary JSON properties to allow adding custom data.

IdTokenType.description: Contains a case insensitive identifier to use for the authorization and the type of authorization to support multiple forms of identifiers.

customData.description: This class does not get 'AdditionalProperties = false' in the schema generation, so it can be extended with arbitrary JSON properties to allow adding custom data.

items.description: Contains a case insensitive identifier to use for the authorization and the type of authorization to support multiple forms of identifiers.

customData.description: This class does not get 'AdditionalProperties = false' in the schema generation, so it can be extended with arbitrary JSON properties to allow adding custom data.

additionalIdToken.description: This field specifies the additional IdToken.

type.description: This defines the type of the additionalIdToken. This is a custom type, so the implementation needs to be agreed upon by all involved parties.

idToken.description: IdToken is case insensitive. Might hold the hidden id of an RFID tag, but can for example also contain a UUID.

customData.description: This class does not get 'AdditionalProperties = false' in the schema generation, so it can be extended with arbitrary JSON properties to allow adding custom data.

hashAlgorithm.description: Used algorithms for the hashes provided.

issuerNameHash.description: Hashed value of the Issuer DN (Distinguished Name).

issuerKeyHash.description: Hashed value of the issuers public key

serialNumber.description: The serial number of the certificate.

responderURL.description: This contains the responder URL (Case insensitive).
